children.heading: .—Retired Pay Multiplier for Regular-Service Nondisability Retirement
children.label: a .—Retired Pay Multiplier for Regular-Service Nondisability Retirement
A
children.text: chapter 61 of this title (relating to retirement or separation for physical disability); or

children.label: B
children.text: chapter 1223 of this title (relating to retirement for non-regular service); or
the retainer pay of a member who is transferred to the Fleet Reserve or the Fleet Marine Corps Reserve under ,section 8330 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: 2½, and

children.label: B
children.text: the member’s years of creditable service (as defined in subsection (c)).

children.heading: .—Reduction applicable to certain new-retirement members with less than 30 years of service
children.label: 2 .—Reduction applicable to certain new-retirement members with less than 30 years of service
A
children.text: 1 percentage point for each full year that the member’s years of creditable service are less than 30; and

children.label: B
children.text: ⁄ of 1 percentage point for each month by which the member’s years of creditable service (after counting all full years of such service) are less than a full year.112

children.heading: .—Retirement beforejanuary 1, 2007
children.label: A .—Retirement beforejanuary 1, 2007
children.text: In the case of a member who retires before , with more than 30 years of creditable service, the percentage to be used under subsection (a) is 75 percent.January 1, 2007

children.label: i
children.text: 75 percent; and

children.label: I
children.text: 2½; and

children.label: II
children.text: the member’s years of creditable service (as defined in subsection (c)) in excess of 30 years of creditable service, under conditions authorized for purposes of this subparagraph during a period designated by the Secretary of Defense for purposes of this subparagraph.

children.heading: .—Reduced multiplier for full tsp members
children.label: A .—Reduced multiplier for full tsp members
i
children.text: paragraph (1)(A) shall be applied by substituting “2” for “2½”;

children.label: ii
children.text: clause (i) of paragraph (3)(B) shall be applied by substituting “60 percent” for “75 percent”; and

children.label: iii
children.text: clause (ii)(I) of such paragraph shall be applied by substituting “2” for “2½”.

children.heading: .—Election to participate in modernized retirement system
children.label: B .—Election to participate in modernized retirement system
children.text: Pursuant to subparagraph (C), a member of a uniformed service serving on , who has served in the uniformed services for fewer than 12 years as of , may elect, in exchange for the reduced multipliers described in subparagraph (A) for purposes of calculating the retired pay of the member, to receive Thrift Savings Plan contributions pursuant to .December 31, 2017December 31, 2017section 8440e(e) of title 5

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: i .—In general
children.text: Except as provided in clauses (ii), (iii), (iv), and (v), a member of a uniformed service described in subparagraph (B) may make the election authorized by that subparagraph only during the period that begins on , and ends on .January 1, 2018December 31, 2018

children.heading: .—Hardship extension
children.label: ii .—Hardship extension
children.text: The Secretary concerned may extend the election period described in clause (i) for a member who experiences a hardship as determined by the Secretary concerned.

children.heading: .—Effect of break in service
children.label: iii .—Effect of break in service
children.text: A member of a uniformed service who returns to service after a break in service that occurs during the election period specified in clause (i) shall make the election described in subparagraph (B) within 30 days after the date of the reentry into service of the member.

children.label: I
children.text: on or after the date on which such cadet, midshipman, or member of the Senior Reserve Officers’ Training Corps is appointed as a commissioned officer or otherwise begins to receive basic pay; and

children.label: II
children.text: not later than 30 days after such date or the end of such election period, whichever is later.

children.label: I
children.text: on or after the date on which such member is transferred from an inactive status to an active status or active duty; and

children.label: II
children.text: not later than 30 days after such date or the end of such election period, whichever is later.

children.heading: .—No retroactive contributions pursuant to election
children.label: D .—No retroactive contributions pursuant to election
children.text: Thrift Savings Plan contributions may not be made for a member making an election pursuant to subparagraph (B) for any period beginning before the date of the member’s election under that subparagraph by reason of the member’s election.

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: E .—Regulations
children.text: The Secretary concerned shall prescribe regulations to implement this paragraph.

children.heading: .—Years of Creditable Service Defined
children.label: c .—Years of Creditable Service Defined
children.text: In this section, the term “years of creditable service” means the number of years of service creditable to a member in computing the member’s retired or retainer pay (including ⁄ of a year for each full month of service that is in addition to the number of full years of service of the member).112
